reason: The tweet refers to Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi (the 'Emir al-Adnani') and uses ISIS terminology like 'mubahala' (a religious ordeal to prove truthfulness). It also has a threatening tone towards someone referred to as 'Abu Farkha'.
taxonomy_labels: Politics and Current Events -> Middle East Conflicts
Politics and Current Events -> Extremism and Radical Ideologies
original_post: مباهلة أميرنا العدناني حفظه الله منذ سنة وهي باذن الله تفعل بكم الافاعيل أمِن عليها إن كنت صادقا يا أبو فرخة لنرى ما يفعل بك
